verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come, behold The Almighty God Come let us see The Pure Word for this hour Before the world began You were on His mind Your Desire You Will Find If You Just Let the Master Rule In Your Heart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come and hear The Words of Life Come, Oh adore The one and only true God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No its not the man But God Himself Who made all things This day Scripture is fulfilled in your ears
